_instructions: AVGVSTO will load it automatically at startup.
Remove any key you don't want to pre-configure.
Delete this file to return to interactive setup.
_usb_id_help: Pre-bind a specific USB key by its SHA-256 ID (get it from USB KEY BINDING section). Leave empty for interactive binding.
_max_attempts_help: Default attempt limit for all encryptions. 0 = unlimited.
_org_name_help: Shown in the title bar and audit log.
_disable_portable_help: Set true to prevent users from enabling portable mode.
_audit_log_path_help: Override audit log location (e.g. a shared network path). Leave empty to use default (~/.avgvsto/audit.log).
